title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released V4, a flagship LLM that significantly reduces inference compute and cost demands compared to prior models. The model represents a shift in the AI race toward leaner, more efficient intelligence amid different incentive structures between open and closed research labs.
